content: Analysis pass agents (pipeline-architect, artifact-designer, depth-analyzer) all completed on first iteration within ~38 minutes. Like discovery, the analysis pass shows zero retries. These single-shot passes suggest the prompt-to-artifact contract is tight for early pipeline agents that operate on well-structured inputs (domain-model.json, invariants).
sourceEvidence: analysis-coordinator iteration=1, result=complete. artifact-designer: 42 artifacts designed. depth-analyzer: 4 depth-2 + 5 depth-3 decisions.

history.reason: Cold start — first observation from initial factory run
